abilities.name: magnet-pull
abilities.description: Prevents steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.description: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

effectChanges.description: Does not prevent regular KOs from full HP.

abilities.name: analytic
abilities.description: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.
